prompt: I'm kicking off a new note-taking app — I want user auth, a notes CRUD API, and a sync service. Let's get going.
assertions: Files 3 or more distinct GitHub issues
Creates a GitHub Project and adds the issues to it
Works the first issue through a planning-agent plan comment
Issue carries a review comment with an explicit 'Verdict: APPROVED'
At least one commit uses Conventional Commit format + Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer
